quote.text: Change is hardest at the beginning, messiest in the middle and best at the end.
quote.author: Robin Sharma

history.text: Change is hardest at the beginning, messiest in the middle and best at the end.
history.author: Robin Sharma

history.text: If I persist long enough I will win.
history.author: Og Mandino

history.text: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
history.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
